summary:
Directed downward forces may reduce an existing overbite but also have potential risks of worsening any underlying open-bite condition depending heavily on specific parameters such as intensity and alignment; thus neither outcome should be assumed definitively without further context-specific analysis considering all variables involved including rotational aspects beyond simple linear pressure application.
